texts.desc:
3 WATER monsters
This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "Levia-Dragoon - Daedalus" once per turn. If this card is Link Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 monster that mentions "Atlantis, the Dragon City" from your Deck. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY; discard your opponent's entire hand, and if you do, they draw the same number of cards. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.
texts.name: Levia-Dragoon - Daedalus
texts.str1: Apply as a Link-2 for a Link Summon ({CARD})
